exploration_notes: The cost model for both IndexScan and TableFullScan lives in plan_cost_ver2.go using the formula `rows * log2(rowSize) * scanFactor`. The key difference is that TableFullScan uses all table columns for rowSize (larger), has minimum floor values, and conditionally applies a full-scan penalty. Plan selection occurs in find_best_task.go where findBestTask4LogicalDataSource iterates candidates and uses compareTaskCost (simple numeric comparison) to pick the cheapest.
